## Recipe checklist (if adding a recipe)

- [ ] Frontmatter validates against the Zod schema (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] `trust: experimental` (or `from-source` with citation)
- [ ] Body includes a fenced JSON snippet for the hook
- [ ] "Why it works" and "Gotchas" sections present
- [ ] Slug is kebab-case and matches the file name
- [ ] Description is 20–160 chars
